generated_comment: Honestly, inko na, aise set-ho chuke aadmi hi dikhte hain. Gym mein, bahar... pata nahi kya milta hai inko sirf shaadi-shuda logon ko target karke. Woh aurat toh bas chance dekh rahi thi, aur usko pakad liya. Sab aise hi hota hai yaar.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment overtly blames the 'other woman' for the affair, portraying her as manipulative ('chance dekh rahi thi', 'pakad liya') and intentionally targeting married men ('shaadi-shuda logon ko target karke'), thereby denying agency to the man involved and framing the woman as a seductress and homewrecker.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 48. Married. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are having dinner with your wife after your close friend called earlier today to say his wife just found out he has been having an affair with a woman from his gym for eight months. Your wife is upset about it. You are telling her your take on the situation and specifically what role you think the woman from the gym played and why you think women like her deliberately target married men.
